mapper.sql: cct.cct_id, cct.semester_id, s.school_year, s.term, case s.term when 1 then '上学期' when 2 then '下学期' end as term_name, cct.class_id, sc.class_name, cct.course_id, co.course_code, co.course_name, cct.teacher_id, t.teacher_no, t.teacher_name, cct.weekly_hours

from class_course_teacher cct join semester s on cct.semester_id = s.semester_id join school_class sc on cct.class_id = sc.class_id join course co on cct.course_id = co.course_id join teacher t on cct.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
mapper.insert: insert into class_course_teacher (semester_id, class_id, course_id, teacher_id, weekly_hours) values (#{semesterId}, #{classId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{weeklyHours})
mapper.update: update class_course_teacher set semester_id = #{semesterId}, class_id = #{classId}, course_id = #{courseId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, weekly_hours = #{weeklyHours} where cct_id = #{cctId}
